programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip Charles Hanson visits the solicitors and Charlie Ross finds history in an old packet of cigarettes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hanson buys something he doesn't like and Charlie Ross profits from a most unlikely item en route to auction in Ledbury, Herefordshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross takes an expensive gamble and Charles Hanson gets invited to a castle as they head for the winner's enclosure at auction near Winchester.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through their trip, Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell are neck and neck, having each won an auction. They begin day three in the seaside town of Southport, shop their way around Lancashire and land in Lincoln for the auction.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Reece joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk to discuss his flair, showmanship, and big ambitions in darts.

programme.title: The Best of Richie Burnett: Top Moments & Highlights
programme.desc: Relive the best moments from Richie Burnett with his top highlights and unforgettable darts action!

programme.title: The Upside Down Darts Challenge
programme.desc: Simon Whitlock, Andy Hamilton and more take on the tricky Upside Down Darts Challenge!

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Mervyn King joins Henry Deacon on Tungsten Talk to reflect on his darts career so far.

programme.title: Should the World Championship Move Venue?
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Paul Nicholson debate whether it's time for the World Championship to move to a new venue.

programme.title: Break of Throw: Steve Beaton and Mervyn King
programme.desc: Glen Durrant analyses the throws of darts legends Steve Beaton and Mervyn King.

programme.title: The Story of Fallon Sherrock
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Glen Durrant discuss the story of Fallon Sherrock's trailblazing rise in darts.

programme.title: The Story of Raymond van Barneveld
programme.desc: Henry Deacon and Paul Nicholson discuss the inspiring story of darts player Raymond van Barneveld.

programme.title: Red Dragon MODUS Super Series Darts Showdown III
programme.desc: Check out the best pairs moments from the Influencer Darts Showdown III, featuring Angry Ginge & Jayden Walker.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: This episode includes: Ghostbusters, Roubas: Dead or Alive?, Elysian Park Treasure, Soldier Alexander and UD: Jail Family.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Huey Long Pts. 1 & 2, Not Home for the Holidays, Broken Hearts, Update: Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Best Friend's Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive Drug Dealer, UD: Model's Third Notebook, Tina's Search & UD, Miracle Buffalo, Lost Gause & UD and Who Killed Superman?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rookie Death, Roswell, Missing Angel, ATV Murders and Murderer's Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Update: Molester Cop, Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Roswell Pts. 1 & 2.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: The Blob, Texas A&M Rapist & UD, Qi Gong, Southie & UD and Where's Baby Le-Zahn? & UD.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Night Before The Storm
programme.desc: In this special episode, it's the night before Sean and Bex are joined by their celebrity guest and they check out The Black Horse in Pluckley Village to investigate the paranormal hauntings at the most haunted pub in the UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean investigate a haunting inside a gothic mansion, that is said to be haunted by the former owner of the building.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Blues Haunting at The Winslow Hotel
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and the team head to Liverpool and investigate a very famous hotel, which Everton football club supporters have frequented for over 100 years and it would appear that some of the guests have never checked out.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fun and Games at The Sportsman Inn
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and Paul, investigate claims of paranormal incidents inside of a haunted inn. Once three separate cottages, will any of the previous residents join the investigation tonight? Or is there something more sinister haunting here?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Witches and Vampires Haunting St James Cemetery
programme.desc: St James Cemetery is set behind Liverpool Cathedral and is claimed to be the worlds most haunted, with the remains of over 58,000 people buried at the location and multiple claims of paranormal sightings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Bex and Sean delve deep into a building that has survived world wars and is home to some very social ghosts. They come face to face with an angry spirit too, and something strange appears to be lurking in the basement.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Prescription For Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bartonville, Illinois to investigate the Peoria Asylum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Permanent Residents
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Cortland, New York to investigate The 1890 House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: All Ghosts On Deck
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Louisville, Kentucky to investigate one of the oldest operating steamboats in the United States, The Belle of Louisville.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts From Hale
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Coventry, Connecticut to investigate the Nathan Hale Homestead. Nathan Hale was an American Patriot who fought in the Revolutionary War and was executed by the Britishfor being a spy.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Scream Park
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Sylvan Beach, New York where the new owner of a historic amusement park finds himself in the middle of a mystery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Ghost Hasn't Left the Building
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Amy is back! TAPS travels to Shreveport, Louisiana to investigate the historic Shreveport Auditorium, a place famous for introducing Elvis and other rock n' rolls stars to the world.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT1
programme.desc: 30 East Drive is said to house the most violent poltergeist in the world. The team go head first into what becomes their toughest challenge yet. As soon as they enter the property something is waiting and wants to be known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT2
programme.desc: The team continue their most threatening investigation yet and for some they will be scared for life mentally and physically. The most violent poltergeist in the world is ready for a fight...but who wins?

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Find, The Golden Cue, The FBI Story, The Gravedigger's Nemesis, Last Rites.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Devil's Autograph, Mail Order Degree, The News Stand, The Murder of Roy Hennessey, Mysterious Strangers.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dealer, Gratuity, The Cake, 1st Time Offender, The Mirror of Truth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Merry-Go-Round, Red Eyed Creature, Used Car Salesman, Surveillance Camera, Graffiti.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Warning, Bus Stop, The Cure, The Guardian, The Gift.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Connie, Positive I.D., Trucker, Cook Out, The New House.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Follow Justin and his friends to a psychiatric hospital known for ghostly activity. Then see what happens when Meghan’s family moves into a new house and she discovers a strange window beside her bedroom.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: A Haunting: Death's Door
programme.desc: Victoria Dane was accidently overdosed before an emergency surgery and flat-lined for more than seven minutes. While recovering, she starts to notice unusual occurrences. She fears that she’s opened a door to a paranormal world that can never be shut.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: House Of Sorrows
programme.desc: In 2012, Darrin and Jamie Shriver move into a home with tragic history. Darrin unwittingly invites dark entities back into the home threatening the safety of his wife and new baby. Paranormal investigators determine a demonic entity is in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Well To Hell
programme.desc: Mark Corvo finds a ceremonial alter in his attic. He reaches out to the Ghosts of New England Research Society for professional help. They believe tenants dabbling in the dark arts opened a portal to the other side and drew spirits to the location.

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzy, who is trying to take a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzy's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzy sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play kite surf with a homemade kite. Grizzy notices that the she-bear he's in love with watches the kite perform arabesques in the sky with admiration.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy snatches the last jar of chocolate spread out from under the noses of the Lemmings. In exchange, he offers them the toy stuck inside the lid, a mini-flute.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play a new game, floating like flags in the breeze from the fan set on maximum. But Grizzy quickly rids the living room of this interference.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The day of the big coronation has finally arrived. Kipo and team have come to learn that the enemy they thought they were fighting is only half as bad as the real enemy, Dr Emilia.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: An epic battle takes place in the palace between Team Kipo, Scarlemagne, Dr Emilia, and the Mega Monkey. Kipo makes one last desperate plea to Scarlemagne, but he just will not listen.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The hunt is on for Dr. Emilia, and friends start to disappear; it will take teamwork to make Kipo's dream of a Human Mute Ultimate Friendship Alliance work.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Dr. Emilia is kidnapping her way to a cure; Kipo and her pals must keep their cool as they stake out the doctor's hideout.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Frenemies return; Kipo reaches out to Scarlemagne, while Margot asks Wolf for a favour.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The Quiquois wonder about chocolate chickens inside chocolate eggs. Olive draws one, and a real rabbit emerges who thinks it is a hen. They plan to meet other animals with confused identities, before boarding a boat for an animal cruise.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mixo hurts his ears grating carrots, which is annoying because it's almost time for the school music festival. Olive draws a wall for Raoul to count on while the others hide. Pierre gets chased by violins and a host of animals with their music.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mixo continuously studies for his test even though he has perfect scores, and Pétole decides that they should do a treetop ropes course so he can stop stressing out. Olive draws a tree and ladder, and they meet Tarzan's grandson while vine-swinging.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats have presentations to prepare for school. Ollie draws a car and they set off on a safari to prehistoric times. They see a dachshund that goes on forever, volcanoes, and a huge mammoth.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The class trip is the same every year. If only they'd go to the moon for a change. Ollie draws a rocket and off they go. But the moon is boring, as all it has is a museum.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Except for Mixo, the MiniWhats don't like eating their vegetables. Ollie draws a table, and they find themselves at Giacommo's, a restaurant that specialises in strange vegetables.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Pamela has had trouble sleeping ever since her Teddy Bear disappeared under her bed. Ollie helps the MiniWhats find it. They escape many dangers on the way to find Pamela's teddy bear Nanouk. It turns out Nanouk is happy and living a new life.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: When Petula shows up, she is hiding her cheek as she has a big, ugly spot on her face. Mustard looks at it and thinks it needs to be treated.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Ollie draws a large book for Raoul, who has to write a story for school but doesn't know how. They go into the book, where they stumble upon the Ugly Duckling.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Mustard doesn't have a grandmother to make him snacks. The others feel bad for him, so Ollie draws him a super-granny market.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats are playing football, but Mixo doesn't like this sport, and the others don't want him to play anyway because he's terrible at it.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: Pamela is learning to fly by jumping on the trampoline when a bird grabs her and takes her off into the air. The MiniWhats set off in a balloon to find her, and end up trapped up there in a funfair, up in the clouds.

programme.title: The MiniWhats
programme.desc: The MiniWhats are bored because they're not allowed to spend as much time on their tablets as they would like.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha and Dasha try to figure out who exactly is the best cook in all of the forest. As usual, Bear will have to be the one to solve the girls' dispute.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear prepares a gift for the Lady Bear and, as usual, dreams of winning his lady's heart. But unfortunately, Masha is also there, and there is no telling what her interference will lead to.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: It's another New Year for Masha and the rest of the gang. Masha has a lot of experience in organising unforgettable celebrations, so she takes matters into her own hands this time around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha saves Bear from a fire and a grateful Bear makes her a gift: a toy fire truck.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has a problem: his garden has been overtaken by dandelions. As Bear tries to fight against the weeds, Masha doesn't understand why he is throwing them away. After all, dandelions can be beautiful!

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is the best mommy in the world, but even she cannot put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: providing a music box. However, the music box turns out to hold a surprise inside.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: A van with monkeys arrives at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction: a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: She-Bear is going on holiday and leaves Bear with her pet: a flycatcher. The modest flower shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there. Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help, and, of course, Masha tags along with him.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The gang have a snow tower and a group of friends and it sounds like a recipe for a fun game. Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie, and Penguin as they figure out who will be the princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Spring has dawned and the birds have arrived, but a pigeon settles in the birdhouse near Bear's house. Masha is obviously more than happy to look after him, making him her new pet.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear has made a new purchase: he has bought a brand new motorcycle. Now, as a cool biker, he plans on impressing She-Bear, but she does not seem to like him or his motorcycle very much.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: On the Case: Shortcut to Murder

programme.title: On the Case: Long Sought Truth

programme.title: On the Case: A Drop of Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is murdered at work. Will a single drop of blood lead police to her killer?

programme.title: On the Case: Deceiving Appearances
programme.desc: Police suspect a mysterious double homicide is not what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Sirens in the Night

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn and Arturo (Jerry O'Connell, John Rhys-Davies) try to find a way of communicating with fire when the Sliders land on a world where the hot element has a mind of its own. With Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) find themselves in a world where Quinn (Jerry O'Connell) must settle a legal dispute on a televised game show. Guest star: Don Most.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks) encounter a world where a master manipulator seemingly has created robots to replace human beings.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders visit a world where Christmas is purely commercial and malls house people. With John Rhys-Davies, Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd and Cleavant Derricks.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Arturo, Wade, Rembrandt and Quinn (John Rhys-Davies, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks, Jerry O'Connell) disturb a pyramid burial site, releasing a giant monster scarab and accidentally breaking the timer.

programme.title: Moesha: Arriving Right On Q
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship hits a snag when Q returns to town; sparks fly between Moesha and Q; Q invites Moesha to spend the summer (as a road manager) on tour with his rap group.

programme.title: Moesha: D-Money Loses His Patience
programme.desc: Hakeem tries to convince Moesha to pass on Q’s offer to go on the road with his band, and focus on her priorities: school, family, and him. Moesha admits to being too distracted to make a clear decision.

programme.title: Moesha: On The Rebound
programme.desc: Moesha and Q decide whether or not to take their relationship to the next level; Dorian returns home from boot camp.

programme.title: Moesha: Bad Company
programme.desc: After spending the summer traveling with Q’s band, Moesha returns home sporting an engagement ring.

programme.title: Moesha: Netcam
programme.desc: Someone places a hidden camera in Moesha and Niecy’s dorm room; Myles’ girlfriend tells him she’s pregnant—and he’s the father!

programme.title: Moesha: Living In Paradise
programme.desc: Moesha tries to straighten out her out-of-control roommates, but they’re more interested in chasing Boys II Men.

programme.title: Moesha: You Say He's Just A Friend
programme.desc: Moesha is tempted by her attraction to good-looking Jamal, while Dorian starts up his own hair solon.

programme.title: Moesha: Just The Two of Us
programme.desc: While Frank and Dorian are on a road trip to Vegas, Myles falls hard for Moesha’s roommate, Alicia.

programme.title: Moesha: The Nutty Moesha
programme.desc: It’s Halloween and Moesha’s acting crazy, Niecy’s growing body hair, and Dorian’s dogsitting a ferocious bulldog.

programme.title: Moesha: The Candidate
programme.desc: A woman city council candidate loses Moesha’s support when she gets the hots for Hakeem.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Family Portrait Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne gathers everyone up for a family portrait.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Nick Hosts a Telethon Episode
programme.desc: Nick host a fund-raiser for charity. Elsewhere, Suzanne tangles with a wealthy client.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Nick Gets an Assistant Episode
programme.desc: Nick is coerced into hiring an assistant, but the newbie gets too close to Nick's family and friends.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Silent Treatment Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne get into an argument and refuse to talk to each other.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Kwandanegaba Children's Fund Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey and Kevin give to a charity, but Nick must step in when the charity keeps asking for more and more money.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Blockbuster Movie Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne plan to attend a high-profile movie premiere, but their busy schedules create complications.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Pocket Dial Episode
programme.desc: Nick retaliates after he overhears Suzanne telling personal information to Gigi.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Secret Episode
programme.desc: The spread of certain secrets could ruin two newfound romances.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Life Insurance Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne consider purchasing life insurance.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Hypertension Episode
programme.desc: Nick discovers he has high-blood pressure and looks for ways to diminish stress in his life.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Vale´rie Bary Case)
programme.desc: On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Scorpion: Queen Scary

programme.title: Scorpion: Go With the Florence

programme.title: Scorpion: Faire is Foul

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee

programme.desc: Shawn's world is turned upside-down during a missing-person case that comes from an unexpected client: Gus' wife!

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: It's youth versus experience when Shawn and Gus team up with Henry to investigate a man's disappearance from a local retirement community.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: On the set of Santa Barbara's most popular Spanish soap opera, life imitates art when a fictional murder turns real, making everyone involved a suspect. Shawn solves the crime from the inside while inadvertently becoming one of the show's stars.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Emancipation
programme.desc: A group posing as volunteers attacks using a stolen skrill prototype that does not require an implant to control. It is discovered that the skrill queen is also missing. The investigation leads to a resistance group called Black Wednesday.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A joint Doors International/Taelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory, but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Once and Future World
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America. Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Thicker than Blood
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augur's is hired by Da'an to get information about the Resistance, resulting in the death of many members. Meanwhile, Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus. They discover a town that Da'an helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Pad'ar
programme.desc: Pad'ar is a fierce battle game where spectators can connect via a "jack patch" that Liam suspects is causing neurological damage to users. When a Pad'ar warrior dies, it raises even more questions about the safety.

programme.title: The Lost World: Amazons
programme.desc: The men find themselves embraced by a tribe of Amazons and discover they are to be studs for the breeding ritual, but this purpose may come with a fatal end.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tourist Season
programme.desc: Challenger builds a windmill. But when his generator is struck by lightning, a portal is opened that ushers in a helicopter carrying a family of tourists from the year 2000.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An ominous castle draws three of the adventurers under its paranormal influence. Roxton, Marguerite, and Malone take on new personalities while the mansion entangles them in a love triangle.

programme.title: The Lost World: Divine Right
programme.desc: A riderless horse leads Roxton to a tribe that makes him king. He must either accept the title or face execution, while the rest of the group is captured.

programme.title: The Lost World: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Marguerite begins acting uncharacteristically nice, the group raises some questions. A stumbling dinosaur in the jungle holds the answer: an alien life force has begun controlling their bodies.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E7 - I, E.T.
programme.desc: A peacekeeper beacon goes off and Moya has to land on an alien planet to prevent its signal being intercepted and Moya being discovered.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic
programme.desc: Crichton's spirit is captured by Maldis. The sorcerer thrives on vengeance and hate, he brings Crais's spirit down. And the two spirits battle.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist
programme.desc: A scientist extracts DNA from several of Moya's crew, promising them that he would be able to use it to find the location of their home planets.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret
programme.desc: During routine searches for Peacekeeper beacons, D'Argo falls down a chute, destroys a Peacekeeper shield and gets ejected into open space.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E11 - 'Til The Blood Runs Clear
programme.desc: While flying Crichton's ship near a sun with high flare activity, John and Aeryn narrowly avoid getting sucked into an unstable wormhole.

programme.title: Mythbusters Outtakes Special
programme.desc: It’s a shame that not all of the testing footage can be included in the final show that goes to air. In this special episode, the outtakes are in with never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 171
programme.desc: Can a person swim through bubbling water? Can an arrow with explosives split a tree in two?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 115
programme.desc: Is it possible to lift a car using fire hoses? Do goats faint when scared? Can a person create a huge fireball with sawdust and a flare?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 196
programme.desc: Should you really never bring a knife to a gunfight? Will you lose a sword fight if you try to strike first? Did the 14th-century Chinese design a two-stage, arrow-launching missile?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 25
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to make a catapult with a boom-lift cherry-picker? Does a person save more gas by driving with the AC on instead of having the windows down?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed Five Times?
programme.desc: Michelle's current boyfriend Everett can't run from Robert's allegations about his daughter. Will Everett's lie detector test results prove his innocence?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Falsely Accused of Molestation?
programme.desc: Desmond believes that his ex Cassandra is making up a story about him touching their child because she's jealous of his new fiancée. And later, Tammy has been investigated for child abuse and even accused of locking her kids in a closet.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Misplaced Loyalty
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Both teams replicate six Hell's Kitchen entrees while kicking chefs out of the kitchen until only one remains. Chef Ramsay holds a `Cook For Your Life' challenge. Robyn, Giovanni, Milly, Barbie, Manda, and Elise must recreate his signature dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After Giovanni goes home, Michelle and Elise continue their heated fight. The chefs compete in a game meat challenge. Michelle sends up raw chicken, Barbie sends up raw duck and Manda sends up raw pork. The teams must decide who to nominate.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Elise and Michelle get into a heated argument that carries over into the next day. In the challenge, the chefs toss fish to collect ingredients. While Barbie annoys her team in punishment, the blue team heads to Vegas for a night of revelry.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Nine all-star chefs compete in a blind taste test challenge, in which they must identify herbs and spices with smashing consequences for their teammates. While one chef guesses, one chef sits in the hot seat and is hit with a mashed potato cannon.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With eight chefs remaining, the red and blue teams battle in a pasta-profit challenge and later go toe-to-toe in a dinner service that features a tense race to the finish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After Dana goes home, the seven remaining chefs learn that it is black jacket day. Chef Ramsay explains that the chefs will compete in three challenges in order to earn their black jacket.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron
programme.desc: Rodney Francis Cameron was dubbed ‘The Lonely Hearts Killer’ after he used a radio match-making program in 1990 to lure an unsuspecting woman to her death. Incredibly, he had only just been released from prison for two other killings in 1974.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
programme.desc: We investigate the story of David and Catherine Birnie, Australia's most sadistic husband and wife killing team, who tortured, raped and murdered four women in 1986.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Headless Body: The Kim Barry Murder
programme.desc: In 1981, the headless and fingerless body of 19-year-old Kim Narelle Barry was found dumped in the bush at a mountain lookout near Wollongong, south of Sydney.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Killing Fields of Truro
programme.desc: For the 2008 launch of Crime Investigation Australia, CI presents the complete and compelling story of "The Killing Fields of Truro", one of the most infamous crimes in Australia and yet another set in Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel
programme.desc: We examine two notorious abduction cases. The first case is the Graeme Thorne ransom kidnapping at Bondi in 1960. Thorne, aged eight, was the son of winners of the Sydney Opera House Lottery.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rusty Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Secrets and Eyes
programme.desc: Toni wrestles with growing older, and William makes a love connection.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Invasion of the Golddigger

programme.title: Girlfriends: Don't Leave Me a Loan
programme.desc: While Maya tries to hide her marital woes from her mother, Lynn faces a financial reckoning with her parents

programme.title: Girlfriends: Star Craving Mad
programme.desc: Joan meets a movie star who isn’t as deep as he seems, and William’s sister makes a surprising request.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Blinded by the Lights
programme.desc: Joan discovers that dating a screen star isn’t as glamorous as it seems.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Mommy Returns
programme.desc: Lynn’s long-lost birth mother resurfaces after 30 years

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Toni falls for a short guy, and Joan doesn’t measure up in Ellis’ eyes.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Santa V. Monica
programme.desc: William’s ambitious girlfriend has big plans that are alienating him from Joan, Lynn, Maya, and Toni.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: DON'T BELIEVE THE HYPE

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A Beautiful Lie

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: The Crush
programme.desc: Nikki gets a taste of her own medicine after Professor Oglevee’s young nephew becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tori, Cassie & Skyler, and Tallulah, Bella, Boris, & Groucho, and Howie
programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and an abused lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Run Home Roscoe!
programme.desc: When Jorge Huerta first laid eyes on him, six month old Akita Roscoe, seemed like a normal, happy puppy. Since joining the Huerta family, Roscoe has refused to go outside the family’s property.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole
programme.desc: Cesar goes to jail to help wayward humans rehabilitate wayward pups through a program called "Pups on Parole."; Bulldogs learn to play fair.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Argonaut & Patches
programme.desc: A family is afraid of being bit by their aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix. Cesar prescribes pack therapy. A Cocker Spaniel has a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shadow Dogs
programme.desc: Search and rescue dogs are more play than work and must get their mission back on track. A couple expecting a baby needs help with curbing their misunderstood rescue’s biting.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Double Axe Murderer: Dennis Smalley
programme.desc: A double axe murderer and no clues - except tiny flakes of paint discovered deep in the wounds of one of the victims. This is a story of how forensic science - and the determination of one detective - found the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Levi Bellfield

programme.title: Killer Britain: Peter Morgan

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.135

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.82

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.140

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.67

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.223
programme.desc: A woman accuses her ex-boyfriend of charging over $10,000 on her emergency credit card while she studied abroad in Germany. A man admits to stabbing an air mattress due to spilled beer, leading to a lawsuit by his girlfriend's ex-boyfriend for damages.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.113
programme.desc: Teen cosmetologist accuses ex-lover of breaking phone/Snowboard instructor sues co-worker for slope collision injuries.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.216
programme.desc: A bar patron, who was beaten up and knocked out, blames the bar co-owner for putting him in danger after he was ejected from his establishment. Brother sues brother over missed payments on a Ford Crown Victoria.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.207
programme.desc: Man regrets buying '95 Thunderbird, sued by fiancée's ex-friend. Another man claims god brother's estranged wife towed his car. Dog handler sues former customers over Chihuahua cost due to alleged gift card fraud.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.190
programme.desc: A landlord/tenant dispute escalates when a man is accused of illegally entering an apartment on three different occasions and a woman is accused of damaging property.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.72
programme.desc: Teen maid of honor sued for failing wedding duties; new bride's father claims cost of missed event plane ticket. Earthquake interrupts courtroom during ex-lovers' case over stolen money allegedly used for drugs.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.226
programme.desc: A father intervenes, hiring attorneys to aid his son in jail release and custody battles after domestic violence charges. The son denies owing anything. A teenager sues ex-roommates for lease breakage.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunt for Mr. Wright
programme.desc: A report on George Wright, who was sentenced to prison for the 1962 murder of New Jersey service station owner Walter Patterson, and who after spending 8 years in prison, escaped, and spent 40 years on the run from the authorities.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Confession
programme.desc: Relatives of a beauty queen who was murdered more than 50 years ago suspect a priest committed the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Imposter
programme.desc: A report about an elusive con man David Pecard, who has taken on more than 20 identities throughout his life of crime. Pecard has infiltrated police departments and top military posts, put criminals behind bars and even posed as a technician.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A New York dentist denies killing his lover's husband -- who was also his best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Dr. Richard Illes, a heart surgeon, and his wife, Miriam, were a prominent couple in Williamsport, PA. Then, on Jan. 15, 1999, Miriam was fatally shot as she stood in front of her kitchen window. Investigators think that Richard was responsible.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: A report about the crimes of the Sun Gym gang, a group of Miami, Florida drifters, petty thieves, and bodybuilders who kidnapped and killed wealthy people to fuel their lifestyle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: With Ton missing, Allen struggles to keep the pawn shop afloat while training Elle to work an auction. After a fierce bidding war with Caroline, pieces from a century old motorcycle may not be enough to save the day. ed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Flying Ton, Creeping Allen
programme.desc: When a group of thugs try to bully Ton and Allen out of a Chinatown auction, the guys fight back, leading to a violent showdown and the discovery of both a rare Bornean blowgun and special effects wire harnesses.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Missouri Loves Company
programme.desc: On a visit to see Ton's sister in Missouri for some rafting and relaxation, the guys hit up a fast-paced live auction. After some tough losses, Ton and Allen score a ballista and an anvil set made for an explosive sport.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Brew-Phoria
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go all in for an electric car, but with the batteries missing, a pricey refurb is their only shot at a profit. Will a home brewing system and high-end air rifles help soften the blow, or will they take a big loss?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn’t come home from work and the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Drive Thru Murder
programme.desc: Missy Berry is found dead in an idling car at a deserted intersection. A surprise twist in the investigation leads him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detectives Steve Keogh and Steve Whittaker discuss the murder of Aseel Al-Essaie by Cohen, Gordon and Bryan. Aseel was killed in a drive-by shooting outside his sister's engagement party in Sheffield.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: When a serial killer targets men in North London parks, detectives race to catch him before he can strike again.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detectives discuss the brutal murder of Mohammed Yousaf. The vulnerable 65-year-old was found dead in his flat in Accrington by his landlord. Yousaf had been stabbed to death by his wife and her lover for the insurance money.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: A young father is killed by a gang with various weapons. Detectives discuss how CCTV, phone and intelligence evidence were used to catch the killers.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Clare Mackintosh takes Simon to a quiet community in Northern Ireland to explore a double murder with close parallels to her Sunday Times best-selling novel, `Let Me Lie'.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Backpacker Killer
programme.desc: In the early 1990s, the tourist hotspot of New South Wales, Australia became a place of fear when backpackers started going missing.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In WWII's final days, Nazis hid evidence of their crimes. SS officers transported boxes to Austria's remote Lake Toplitz, witnessed dumping them on May 1, 1945. Rumors. Rumors claimed the boxes held stolen gold, part of a $500M Nazi heist.

programme.title: Myth Hunters

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Invasion on Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare new missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: STAR LIGHT, STAR BRIGHT
programme.desc: The two current science missions to our star; the sun have made great leaps forward in the science of how stars work, how they generate solar winds and how they affect their orbiting planets

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Looking Back and Talking Quack
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Grass & The Furious
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Duckmen when an old high school nemesis challenges them to a good old-fashioned race.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Driving Miss Sadie
programme.desc: With Sadie's driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons. Willie, Jase and Si each set out to correct her glaring failures behind the wheel by teaching her how to drive... Robertson-style.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Truck Commander
programme.desc: After Willie's son, John Luke, leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sweatin' Bullets
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Spring Pong Cleaning
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Jonathan casts a retired comic and his movie-star son in a play about a father and son who never got to know each other.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Amazing Man
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All the Colors of the Heart
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Why Punish the Children?
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dream of Wild Horses
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: In With the "In" Crowd
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.
